basis.authority_note: These are reconstructed artifacts, not original Stage 2-7 support bundles, except Stage 6 which was reuploaded and verified.

stages.CDR_STAGE2: Full code acceptance contract and recursive audit loop: all CDR dimensions require evidence; valid fixture allow, missing regression deny.
stages.CDR_STAGE3: Recursive audit expansion and risk-tiered test matrix: LOW/MEDIUM/HIGH/CRITICAL evidence tiers; authority export trigger escalates to CRITICAL.
stages.CDR_STAGE4: Source-level self-audit and fixture generation: audit CDR governance source, require fixture/eval coverage, generate negative fixtures.
stages.CDR_STAGE5: Source style and debuggability retrofit: module headers Purpose/Inputs/Outputs/Failure modes/Debuggability and structured denial reasons.
stages.CDR_STAGE6: Adaptability and interface contract hardening: uploaded support bundle verified and extracted; requires purpose, IO, errors, side effects, compatibility, extension and deprecation policy.
stages.CDR_STAGE7: Security and observability deepening: require input validation, access control, secret protection, file path safety, safe error logging, recurrence controls, trace span/error/correlation/export/log integrity.

bundle_type: SUPPORT/PROOF BUNDLE — NOT THE OS BUNDLE
